task_params.title: Portland Restoration Studio Planning Outline
planning_points: shop vision centered on classic car restoration and custom artistry
services: paintwork, upholstery, fabrication, and mechanical upgrades
small apprenticeship program for local youth trainees
space needs: two bays, paint area, storage, and front desk
startup needs: tools, lift access, permits, and insurance
near-term goal: simple launch plan for the Portland neighborhood
